Description

    Description

    FailoverAutoConfiguration.payloadSplitterLookup()
    Creates the payload-splitter lookup bean.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type PayloadSplitterLookup
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverHandler<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverHandler(KeyGenerator keyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy<Object> expiryPolicy, FailoverClock clock, FailoverStore<Object> failoverStore, PayloadEnricher<Object> payloadEnricher, RecoveredPayloadHandler recoveredPayloadHandler, CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, PayloadSplitterLookup<Object,Object> payloadSplitterLookup, ContextPropagator contextPropagator, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor> scatterGatherExecutorProvider, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Assembles the full FailoverHandler decorator chain: AdvancedFailoverHandler(ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(DefaultFailoverHandler)).

  • Uses of PayloadSplitterLookup in com.societegenerale.failover.core

    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.core with parameters of type PayloadSplitterLookup
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(FailoverHandler<T> delegateT, FailoverHandler<R> delegateR, PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R> payloadSplitterLookup)
    Sequential constructor — no executor, no context propagator.
     
    ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(FailoverHandler<T> delegateT, FailoverHandler<R> delegateR, PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R> payloadSplitterLookup, @Nullable Executor executor, ContextPropagator contextPropagator)
    Parallel constructor without an explicit timeout (waits indefinitely).
     
    ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(FailoverHandler<T> delegateT, FailoverHandler<R> delegateR, PayloadSplitterLookup<T,R> payloadSplitterLookup, @Nullable Executor executor, ContextPropagator contextPropagator, @Nullable Duration timeout)
    Full constructor — use when parallel scatter, context propagator and/or a slice timeout is required.
